examples: He seemed undaunted by all the opposition to his idea.
Undaunted by the scale of the job, Lesley set about planning how each room should look.
Echoing the best traditions of "Tom and Jerry", the mouse remains undaunted and even raises a paw to fend off his larger foe.
Undaunted, Clark stormed through the field, recording one lap record after another eventually regaining first place.
Undaunted, he has been searching for work online, using the free computers at a public library.
